## Summary by Anomaly Category

| Category | Count | Resolution |
|---|---|---|
| Exact duplicate row | 1 | Parked — requires manual Reject |
| Payer name not found (typo) | 1 | Parked — requires manual correction + Approve |
| Missing payer | 1 | Parked — requires manual resolution |
| Percentage splits don't sum to 100% | 1 | Parked — requires correction |
| Future date | 1 | Parked — requires verification |
| Extreme amount outlier | 1 | Parked — requires verification |
| Split type conflict (equal + details) | 1 | Parked — requires decision |
| Amount format (comma in quotes) | 1 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
| Payer casing (lowercase name) | 1 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
| Rounding precision (3 decimals) | 1 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
| Non-standard date format | 1 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
| Trailing whitespace in payer | 1 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
| Missing currency field | 1 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
| USD multi-currency conversion | 2 | Auto-resolved ✅ |
